coverage.branchCeilingReason: NestJS @Injectable() + AuthGuard + PassportStrategy IIFE artifacts in compiled JS, TypeScript interface property c8 source-map offsets

findings.description: user.findUnique({id}) senza tenantId in generateRegistrationOptions — cross-tenant user lookup possibile
findings.remediation: findFirst({id, tenantId}) + threading tenantId da controller via @CurrentUser

findings.description: passkey.findMany({userId}) senza tenantId in listPasskeys — cross-tenant passkey listing
findings.remediation: findMany({userId, user:{tenantId}}) con nested relation filter Prisma

findings.description: passkey.findFirst({id, userId}) senza tenantId in deletePasskey — cross-tenant passkey delete
Metodo privato checkRoleHierarchy mai chiamato — dead code
findings.remediation: Rimuovere o collegare a canActivate se la gerarchia ruoli è necessaria

findings.description: Mancano metriche Prometheus per MFA failure rate e passkey usage statistics

ceilingsAccepted.reason: @Injectable() + extends AuthGuard('jwt') IIFE — NestJS decorator artifact
TypeScript interface property lines source-map artifacts
Class field initializer + empty constructor artifacts
WebAuthn protocol: credentialId lookup globale necessario per design (W3C spec §6.1)
